title: R v D’unienville & Ors [2026] SCSC 18
text:
SUPREME COURT OF SEYCHELLES 

  

Reportable 

CO 03/2025 

  

In the matter between: 

THE REPUBLIC                                                                                         Prosecution

(rep. by Mr Adam Afif)

  

versus 

  

RINO D’UNIENVILLE                                                                              3 rd Accused 

(rep. by Mr Basil Hoareau) 

  

Neutral Citation: The Republic v Rino D’unienville & Ors (CO 03/2025) 4 th February 2026 

Before:                   N. Burian, J 

Summary:             Bail Application 

Heard:                   15 th January and 21 st January 2026 

Delivered:              4 th February 2026
